title: vaccinium puberulum var. spathulatum
intro: Vaccinium puberulum var. spathulatum, also known as the Spotted Blueberry or Small-leaved Bilberry, is a small shrub species that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae) and is native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds that have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Vaccinium puberulum var. spathulatum include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support cognitive function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
